prose:
**Furan frontier-orbitals result** — Property: HOMO–LUMO gap from a DFT frontier-orbitals single-point calculation. Method used: tier `standard` with **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** in **PySCF**, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: fixed user-supplied XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz` (9 atoms); no geometry relaxation was reported for this task. SCF converged in 9 cycles.

Headline result: **HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV**.

Additional orbital values returned by chemkit: HOMO = -6.3597638 eV; LUMO = -0.1024036 eV. Total electronic energy = -230.11429 hartree = -6261.7289 eV.

Warnings: no warnings were reported in the chemkit result.

Engine integrity verdict: `trustworthy: true`.

Reproducibility: chemkit command returned in the result was `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmplx_7sstu/live.json`. The tool result did not include a live `.out` log path, so I cannot honestly report one.
